title: Semantik Architect Contract Schema — EntityRef
description: Canonical normalized entity reference used in ConstructionPlan slot_map values and lexical/runtime handoff objects. This schema reflects the planner/runtime contract shape rather than older frame-local compatibility shapes.

label.description: Required canonical display label for the referenced entity, used as the default surface form if no more specific realization override is available.

entity_id.description: Optional stable internal or external entity identifier. Often a database ID, URI, or other normalized entity key.

qid.description: Optional Wikidata-style QID or equivalent knowledge-base identifier.

entity_type.description: Optional coarse semantic type hint such as 'person', 'organization', 'place', 'event', or 'artifact'.

gender.description: Optional gender feature for downstream agreement or pronoun selection.

number.description: Optional grammatical number feature, typically values such as 'sg' or 'pl'.

person.description: Optional grammatical person feature for downstream realization.

surface_hint.description: Optional preferred surface realization hint, distinct from the canonical label.

features.description: Optional arbitrary feature bag carried with the entity reference for realization, agreement, discourse, or construction-specific needs.
